articles.title: The Weirdest Godzilla Movie Ever Is Finally Coming Out on Blu-ray!
articles.summary: Imagine a Godzilla movie that feels like a crazy dream with wild colors, loud sounds, and real war clips. That's Cozzilla, a super rare Italian version from 1977. It's finally getting a Blu-ray release in a big box set on May 17.

articles.title: Secret Sonic Adventure Art Shows a Totally Different Blue Blur!
articles.summary: Sega just shared never-before-seen drawings from early Sonic Adventure. Sonic looks shorter and cuter, Amy explores a spooky castle, and there are funny soot balls like in a Studio Ghibli movie. It's a peek at a Sonic game that almost was!

articles.title: Emma Raducanu Reunites with the Coach Who Helped Her Win the US Open!
articles.summary: Tennis star Emma Raducanu just trained with Andrew Richardson, the coach who was with her when she shocked the world by winning the 2021 US Open as a teenager. She's getting ready to play in Rome next week after being sick.
